= FAQ and Help articles =
* [[Help Contents|Help main]]
* FAQs

= Guides =
* [[Community guides]]
* [[Game modification]]
* [[Playing guides]]

= How To =
* [[Compile OpenLieroX]]
* [[Obtaining OpenLieroX source from Git]]

<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20110721115607/http://www.openlierox.net/wiki/index.php/Guides -->
